97 C0300B_RPT_CRCT_MO_CD C0300B_RPT_CRCT_MO_CD C0300B BIMS: Temporal Orientation - Able to Report Correct Month CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies how closely the resident knew the current month. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Missed by > 1 month or no answer
1=Missed by 6 days to 1 month
2=Accurate within 5 days
^=Blank(skip pattern)
